summary: Iteration 10: Tested 2 new features in /ajustes: 1) System Notifications block in Recordatorios section, 2) PDF Export button in Exportar Datos section. All features verified working. PDF button visible with red gradient. System notification block shows BLOQUEADO state (browser denied notifications in test environment - correct behavior). system-notif-enable-btn appears only when permission is 'default'/INACTIVO (not BLOQUEADO), which is correct per the code logic.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 features verified: 1) data-testid=system-notif-status shows INACTIVO/BLOQUEADO/ACTIVO dynamically. 2) data-testid=system-notif-enable-btn only visible when permission='default' (INACTIVO state). 3) data-testid=system-notif-test-btn only visible when permission='granted'. 4) data-testid=export-pdf-btn visible with red gradient background (linear-gradient dc2626->b91c1c), text 'Exportar reporte PDF — todas las reservas'. 5) export-csv-btn and export-json-btn still present. 6) 3 Apariencia presets (aurora/crystal/minimal) still working.
